spoilers.title: Oshi no Ko Season 3 #11 (Last Episode) ends near the end of Chapter 127 Adapts 119, 120 (half of the chapter, then switches to interlude 3, which replaces the Kana and Shima scene, and then switches b
spoilers.text: Oshi no Ko Season 3 #11 (Last Episode) ends near the end of Chapter 127 Adapts 119, 120 (half of the chapter, then switches to interlude 3, which replaces the Kana and Shima scene, and then switches back to the rest of 120), 121, 122, 123, 124, 125, 126, 127 (only half of the chapter, up until Aqua asks if Tsukuyomi wants to play the child in the movie) Runtime: around 54 minutes (there is OP+ED) Insert Song: You are light feat. o.j.o HOLY SHIT MAN, they fucking cooked, especially the 121-123 stretch and Miyakos part...its so fucking peak...its definitely the best episode in Season 3, Ruby and Miyakos VAs cooked so hard + Kappes drawings are too good (theres even some sakuga) oh and also, there is a C-Part, in this C-Part, it plays the C-Part from Season 1 Episode 1 (DVD scene), but after Ai says "As your mother, thats all i want", she carries on speaking: "Phew… I got a little nervous. I’ve always wanted to try something like this. Oh, and one more thing… this is for you, Ruby. There’s something I want to tell you when you’re older" we never got the contents of Ruby's DVD in the manga...👀 anyway, overall, i really fucking enjoyed it, 9/10

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 I have to say I'm very pleased with how Oda has handled Imu so far. The reason I criticized Kaguya(Naruto)was that she appeared at the end and was quickly dealt with. With Imu, Oda devel
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 I have to say I'm very pleased with how Oda has handled Imu so far. The reason I criticized Kaguya(Naruto)was that she appeared at the end and was quickly dealt with. With Imu, Oda develops Imu quite early on, it just keeps better and I have high expectations.

items.text: Oshi no Ko Season 3 #11 (Last Episode) ends near the end of Chapter 127 Adapts 119, 120 (half of the chapter, then switches to interlude 3, which replaces the Kana and Shima scene, and then switches back to the rest of 120), 121, 122, 123, 124, 125, 126, 127 (only half of the chapter, up until Aqua asks if Tsukuyomi wants to play the child in the movie) Runtime: around 54 minutes (there is OP+ED) Insert Song: You are light feat. o.j.o HOLY SHIT MAN, they fucking cooked, especially the 121-123 stretch and Miyakos part...its so fucking peak...its definitely the best episode in Season 3, Ruby and Miyakos VAs cooked so hard + Kappes drawings are too good (theres even some sakuga) oh and also, there is a C-Part, in this C-Part, it plays the C-Part from Season 1 Episode 1 (DVD scene), but after Ai says "As your mother, thats all i want", she carries on speaking: "Phew… I got a little nervous. I’ve always wanted to try something like this. Oh, and one more thing… this is for you, Ruby. There’s something I want to tell you when you’re older" we never got the contents of Ruby's DVD in the manga...👀 anyway, overall, i really fucking enjoyed it, 9/10
